problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
